description.en: Fork. Connect the child’s controlling terminal to a pseudo-terminal. Return value is (pid, fd). Note that the child gets pid 0, and the fd is invalid. The parent’s return value is the pid of the child, and fd is a file descriptor connected to the child’s controlling terminal (and also to the child’s standard input and output). Warning On macOS the use of this function is unsafe when mixed with using higher-level system APIs, and that includes using urllib.request.
